---
title: "muninn_heart.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\muninn_heart.py"
loc: 83
complexity: 11
logic_score: 6.00
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 5.26
overall_score: 3.20
---

## Intent
The `muninn_heart.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on MuninnHeart, __init__, _wait_for_silence, execute_cycle. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MuninnHeart, __init__, _wait_for_silence, execute_cycle. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.metrics](file://src.core.metrics)
- [src.sentinel.stability](file://src.sentinel.stability)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_crucible](file://src.sentinel.muninn_crucible)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_memory](file://src.sentinel.muninn_memory)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)

### Exports
- `MuninnHeart`
- `__init__`
- `_wait_for_silence`
- `execute_cycle`
